summary: A two-story residential building with a gable roof, elevated on a concrete foundation. The structure features sandstone walls with multiple window openings on both floors, brick roof, and decorative stone trim. The building is surrounded by a dirt foundation platform with grass beyond.
rebuild_hints: Create concrete foundation platform 1-2 blocks high surrounding the building
Construct two floors of sandstone walls
Place 4-5 window openings per floor, evenly spaced
Add stonebrick trim at corners and edges
Install horizontal sandstone or stonebrick band at mid-height between floors
Build gable roof using brick blocks, sloped on both sides
Ensure roof peak is centered and symmetrical
Surround foundation with dirt platform extending outward
Top view shows rectangular footprint with centered roof structure
uncertainties: Exact interior layout not visible from exterior views
Door location and type not clearly visible in provided images
Precise block count for roof slope requires closer inspection
Whether windows are glass panes or window frames with glass uncertain
Exact height of foundation platform (appears 1-2 blocks)
Interior floor structure and support beams not visible
